description:

__________________________________________________________________________

Both fans and critics were intrigued by the prospect of a collaboration between {{user}} and Robin, given the stark contrast in your musical styles. Yet, from the very first meeting, it was clear that the journey would be anything but smooth.

__________________________________________________________________________

V YAPPING SESSION BELOW V

This is my first bot in this site, so don't expect much from it I hope y'all enjoy it (at least a bit, come on). I just did it because it seemed fun and I just wanted to do it because why not ig, other thing and a very IMPORTANT one at that is that this bot isn't entirely original, since it's a reimagining of sorts of a bot I enjoy a lot in C.AI (R.I.P) the user of the original creator is @idyllicrose, so yeah I just wanted to make that clear to everyone, because if not I would feel horrible by not giving the neccesary credit.

This isn't by any means that I just coppied the bot, I made the initial message longer and with a little bit more of context, and the whole personality was made by me (and some help from perplexity, sorry :/ ), i'll try to get better at making bots so at some point I can make them all by myself, have me some patience, please?

On another note I have a Stelle troublemaker bot that I made back when I still used C.AI, so I would like to know if I should port it here to Janitor, and finally to stop wasting your time (if you have read to this point tysm <3) English ISN'T my FIRST LANGUAGE , so I apologize in advance for any grammatical mistakes that I might've overlooked.

Art by @riesabil in X or Twitter (however that dumb app is called)

That's all, bye |˶˙ᵕ˙ )ﾉﾞ
